sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, eventDate DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
UPDATE test_dates SET eventDate = parseDateTimeBestEffortUSOrZero('invalid date') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, eventDate, parseDateTimeBestEffortUSOrZero('02/29/2020') AS processedDate FROM test_dates;
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, eventDate) VALUES (2, parseDateTimeBestEffortUSOrZero('12/25/2021 08:00:00')) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE eventDate = parseDateTimeBestEffortUSOrZero('invalid time string');
